steps.title: Use only the x-term products
steps.content: The question asks for $b$, the coefficient of $x$ in $ax^2+bx+c$. In $$(8x-27)(14x+5),$$ the $x$ term comes only from the cross products.

steps.title: Combine the cross products
steps.content:
$$8x\cdot5=40x$$
$$-27\cdot14x=-378x$$
So the coefficient of $x$ is $$40-378=-338.$$ The answer is -338.
